heading: Word gets around
subheading: A five-table room earns its reputation one bowl at a time. Here's what Port Orchard is saying.

items.quote: The depth of the broth is unreal. The tonkotsu is rich and savory, and the pork is so tender it falls apart.
items.author: Google review

items.quote: Shoyu ramen with scrumptious pork — the kind of bowl you think about days later.
items.author: Google review

items.quote: Start with the chicken katsu. Trust me.
items.author: Google review

items.quote: Small, clean spot — only five tables, so go early. Worth the wait every time.
items.author: Google review
